## Decisions Made

- \n1. `/audit` — baseline health snapshot\n2. `/curator` — structural dead assets\n3. `/simplify` — what to cut\n4. `/efficiency` — runtime cost\n5. `/guardian` — ongoing monitoring baseline\n\n### clean; settings.local.json clean\n- 8 Active skills, 14 Beta in SKILLS-INDEX\n- 7 slash commands in .claude/commands/\n\n**File structure:**\n- Skills: `Vault/05-Prompts/Skills/Cross-Cutting/` (4 custom Active skills + audit, discover, guardian, plan-project)\n- Commands: `.claude/commands/` (7 files: audit, curator, discover, efficiency, guardian, plan-project, simplify)\n- Constitution: `Vault/03-Projects/AI Software Factory/Repository-Constitution.md`\n- Strategic template: `Vault/Templates/Strategic-Review-Prompt.md`\n\n**User preferences (from memory):**\n- Short one-line commit messages, no Co-Authored-By trailers\n- Finish through completion (don't stop with pending todos)\n- Check DECISIONS.md before any architectural proposal\n- Chroma requires Docker running\n- FSM not wired into production (standalone scripts only)\n</analysis>\n\n<summary>\n1. Primary Request and Intent:\n\nThe session had several phases of work:\n\n**Phase 1 (Post-compaction completion):** Complete the remaining 4 tasks from a prior audit session — close Cleanup-Plan-2026-06-10.md, create individual phase docs for phases 15-18, create validate-phase-17.js and validate-phase-18.js validators, and commit everything.\n\n**Phase 2 (Skill design review):** The user shared two skill drafts (Repository Curator, Repository Optimization Architect) and the idea for a Repository Constitution.md companion document, asking for feedback and improvement suggestions.\n\n**Phase 3 (Three new items review):** User shared 10 concrete audit findings (settings duplication, dead scripts, zero-byte logs, orphaned commands, etc.), a Claude Runtime Efficiency Engineer skill draft, and a Fresh Start Architecture Review prompt — asking for thoughts on all three.\n\n**Phase 4 (Implementation):** \"go ahead and start implementing\" — execute all planned items from the analysis: cleanup findings, build Constitution, build all skills, add slash commands.\n\n**Phase 5 (Run all commands):** \"run all of the commands in the order they seem fit\" — execute /audit, /curator, /simplify, /efficiency, /guardian in sequence.\n\n---\n\n2. Key Technical Concepts:\n\n- AI Software Factory: 18-phase completed project; Node.js scripts; Obsidian Vault; Chroma vector DB; Docker; Claude Code CLI\n- Repository Constitution.md: Governing standard defining what the repo should look like (distinct from CLAUDE.md = how Claude behaves, DECISIONS.md = history)\n- Skill format: YAML frontmatter (type, name, version, status, tags, authority, chroma_collection, maintenance_owner, next_review_date) + sections: Problem Statement, Trigger Examples, Required Inputs, Allowed Actions, Approval Required, Core Workflow, Output Template, Quality Bar\n- Skill domains: Architecture, Implementation, Infrastructure, Cross-Cutting\n- Curator vs. Runtime Efficiency Engineer boundary: Curator = structural/organizational/dead assets; Runtime Engineer = token/context/MCP session cost\n- Simplification Audit: lightweight \"reduce 50%, preserve 95%\" analysis that works within existing ADRs\n- Strategic Review Prompt: annual template (not a skill/command) for \"Day 0\" redesign analysis\n- Full vs. Incremental mode in Curator skill\n- Phase 0 pattern: Always read Constitution + DECISIONS.md before making recommendations\n- PostCompact hook: `create-session-note.js` runs on compact events, extracts work/decisions/blockers via regex, writes Session-Summary files to Vault/08-Retrospectives/\n- `settings.local.json` vs `settings.json`: local = gitignored personal overrides; project = committed team-wide settings\n- `git ls-files -ci --exclude-standard`: detects tracked-but-gitignored files (must return empty)\n- Vault validator: `node .claude/scripts/vault-validator.js` — checks frontmatter on all Vault docs\n\n---\n\n3. Files and Code Sections:\n\n**`.claude/settings.json`** (modified)\n- Removed `\"Bash(docker ps)\"` from `permissions.allow` (redundant with SessionStart hook)\n- Updated SessionStart hook message to be purpose-neutral:\n```json\n\"command\": \"docker ps > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo '{\\\"systemMessage\\\": \\\"Docker is running\\\"}' || echo '{\\\"systemMessage\\\": \\\"Docker is NOT running. Services requiring Docker (e.g. Chroma) will be unavailable.\\\"}'\"\n```\n\n**`.claude/settings.local.json`** (rewritten)\n- Removed redundant `enabledMcpjsonServers: [\"chroma\", \"filesystem\"]` (covered by `enableAllProjectMcpServers: true`)\n- Removed all 4 `mcp__chroma__*` allowlist entries\n- Removed stale one-off permission entries\n- Final state:\n```json\n{\n  \"permissions\": {\n    \"allow\": [\n      \"Bash(git config *)\",\n      \"Bash(git add *)\",\n      \"Bash(git commit *)\",\n      \"Bash(git push *)\"\n    ]\n  },\n  \"enableAllProjectMcpServers\": true\n}\n```\n\n**`package.json`** (modified)\n- Added `\"test:phase-17\"` and `\"test:phase-18\"` script entries\n- Added `validate-phase-17.js` and `validate-phase-18.js` to `test:all` and `test` chains\n\n**`.claude/scripts/validate-phase-17.js`** (created)\n- 5 tests: Known-Problems casing, SKILLS-INDEX Active skills format, phase 15/16 validators exist, validator syntax, test:all includes phases 15/16\n\n**`.claude/scripts/validate-phase-18.js`** (created)\n- 6 tests: pipeline scripts exist (scaffold, build, ship), syntax checks, npm scripts defined, GETTING-STARTED.md exists, phase-plan-generator skill exists, test:all includes phases 17/18\n\n**`Vault/03-Projects/AI Software Factory/Phase-15-Agent-Memory.md`** (created)\n- Status: complete (2026-06-09); seed-agent-memory.js, session-handoff.js, context-assembly.js extension\n\n**`Vault/03-Projects/AI Software Factory/Phase-16-Chroma-Rebuild.md`** (created)\n- Status: complete (2026-06-10); chromadb JS SDK, chroma-ingest.js + context-assembly.js rewrite, 146/148 docs ingested\n\n**`Vault/03-Projects/AI Software Factory/Phase-17-Cleanup.md`** (created)\n- Status: complete (2026-06-10); defers structural findings to curator\n\n**`Vault/05-Prompts/Skills/Cross-Cutting/simplification-audit-v1.0.md`** (created, ~180 lines)\n- Active skill; core question: \"reduce by 50%, preserve 95%\"; This is expected behavior, not an error.\n\n---\n\n5. Problem Solving:\n\n**Skill overlap problem:** Original Curator + Optimizer drafts both covered agents, MCPs, documentation — creating duplicate findings. Resolved by: creating a strict boundary table (12 concerns split between Curator and Runtime Efficiency Engineer), having each skill explicitly defer on the other's territory.\n\n**\"Skill too long\" problem:** Both drafted skills were 400+ lines. Solution: Constitution takes the \"what we value\" content; skills become execution procedures targeting ≤250 lines.\n\n**Fresh Start prompt frequency mismatch:** Prompt questions foundational decisions in ADRs. As a skill it could be called any session, destabilizing a 18-phase stable project. Solution: stored as `Vault/Templates/Strategic-Review-Prompt.md` (template, not skill/command). Phase 10 extracted as a separate, safer `simplification-audit-v1.0.md` skill.\n\n**WORKFLOW.md drift:** Document described `develop` branch, feature branches, PR-only merges to main. Reality: all commits go directly to main. Fixed by restructuring to show single-branch as current mode, multi-branch as available-when-needed.\n\n---\n\n6.
